overall.description: A cinematic Unreal Engine 5 rendering of a flooded Palace of Fine Arts in San Francisco. The first-person perspective moves through water-covered pathways and around the iconic domed rotunda, showcasing detailed water reflections and classical architecture in a post-flood scenario.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded pathway lined with concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow barricaded pathway with water covering the ground

entered.detail: large concrete barriers painted with white and black stripes lining the left side of the path
large concrete barriers painted with white and black stripes lining the right side of the path
classical stone buildings with arched windows visible behind the barriers on the left
dense green tree canopy forming a tunnel over the pathway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, flooded pathway flanked by large striped concrete barriers. Historic stone buildings are visible to the left while dense green trees create a canopy overhead. The path is completely empty of people or vehicles.

events.description: camera turns right toward the water, revealing the Palace of Fine Arts rotunda in the distance

agents.ego_description: approaching a crosswalk and turning right toward the flooded lagoon area

entered.detail: white painted crosswalk lines visible on the flooded asphalt surface
large classical domed building emerging into view in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a crosswalk area and begins turning right, transitioning from the enclosed pathway to an open area. The concrete barriers fall behind while the iconic domed Palace of Fine Arts rotunda comes into view across the flooded lagoon.

events.description: text overlay 'PALACE OF FINE ARTS' appears as the view opens to the flooded monument

agents.ego_description: moving along the water's edge observing the flooded Palace of Fine Arts rotunda

entered.detail: calm flood water covering the ground and reflecting the sky and buildings
classical stone colonnade structures partially submerged in the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide flooded lagoon with the Palace of Fine Arts rotunda prominently visible across the water. A title card identifies the location. The camera moves along the shoreline, revealing partially submerged classical colonnades and trees standing in the floodwater.

agents.ego_description: circling along the water's edge to view the palace rotunda from multiple angles

entered.detail: low stone wall along the water's edge covered in moss and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the flooded waterfront, circling to show different perspectives of the Palace of Fine Arts. The rotunda shifts across the frame as the viewpoint changes, revealing more of the surrounding colonnades and the extent of the flooding around the monument.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined, flooded corridor into a wide, open vista of the submerged Palace of Fine Arts. It begins by moving through a narrow pathway flanked by striped concrete barriers and historic stone buildings, with dense green trees forming a canopy overhead. As the camera passes through a crosswalk and turns right, the enclosed walls fall away to reveal the iconic domed rotunda across a vast, flooded lagoon. The scene then expands along the shoreline, gliding past partially submerged classical colonnades and trees standing in the still water. Finally, the camera circles the waterfront, shifting the perspective of the rotunda and the surrounding monuments to showcase the full extent of the flooding.
